title: stelis hypnicola
intro: Stelis hypnicola, also known as the Night-Blooming Orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine, particularly in Brazil, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Stelis hypnicola include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Stelis hypnicola typically involve infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea, or using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
